'''Whisk the Elder''' was an ancient [[Geelan]] who was sent to confer with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Vence Tabok]]. Whisk warned the admiral that if he did now withdraw his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces from [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] a great tragedy would strike. The admiral did not believe him. Whisk disappeared when the station vanished under mysterious circumstances. Rumors had it that he was in reality [[Great Geel]] himself.<ref name="Zirtran's Anchor (article)" />

{{Char-stub}}
